speaker: speaker1
text: You would be using mainly English in this job . Do you think you could manage ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I am sure I can .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think you are proficient in both written and spoken English ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I think I am quite proficient in both written and spoken English .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think you can make yourself understood in English with ease ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I think I can in ordinary circumstances .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think you can speak English quite fluently ? Tell me about your English education .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I think I speak English quite fluently . I got a high score on TOEFL . I majored in English in college .
